zh.lifeSummary: 當Ingabo Hughes於1730年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯時，她的父親Francis Alexander Hughes Sr34歲，母親Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson26歲。她於1748年之前與Reuben Allen Jr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1785年在美國維吉尼亞州奧古斯塔享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ingabo Hughes于1730年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯时，她的父亲Francis Alexander Hughes Sr34岁，母亲Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson26岁。她于1748年之前与Reuben Allen Jr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1785年在美国弗吉尼亚州奧古斯塔享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries 1752: Berks, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Berks, Pennsylvania, United States

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Richmond Becomes the Capital
historicEvents.description: On April 18, 1780 Richmond became the capital of Virginia. It was the temporary capital from 1780-1788.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History- History of Richmond Virginia

en.lifeSummary: When Ingabo Hughes was born in 1730, in Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, her father, Francis Alexander Hughes Sr, was 34 and her mother, Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson, was 26. She married Reuben Allen Jr before 1748, in Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1785, in Augusta, Virginia, United States, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ingabo Hughes est née en 1730, à Berks, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Francis Alexander Hughes Sr, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Reuben Allen Jr avant 1748, à Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1785, à Augusta, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ingabo Hughes 1730 in Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Francis Alexander Hughes Sr 34 und ihre Mutter Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson 26. Sie hat vor 1748 in Virginia, British Colonial America Reuben Allen Jr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1785 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Augusta, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten.

ko.lifeSummary: Ingabo Hughes(이)가 1730년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 버크스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Francis Alexander Hughes Sr(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1748년 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 Reuben Allen Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1785년 미국 버지니아 주 오구스타에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Mount Jackson, Shenandoah County, Virgin: маунт плисант, шенандоах, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ingabo Hughes родилась в 1730 г. в местности биркс, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Francis Alexander Hughes Sr было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Christina Nilsdötter Jonasson, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reuben Allen Jr перед 1748 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1785 г. в местности аугуста, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 55 лет.
